title: Living Room Design
subtitle: Where comfort meets refined elegance
excerpt: Transform your living area into a stylish, functional space that reflects your personality and welcomes guests.
description: Your living room is the heart of your home — the place where family gathers, guests are entertained, and everyday moments become memories. We approach every living space with a commitment to balance: ensuring it's as beautiful to look at as it is comfortable to live in.
description2: From the architectural bones to the final cushion placement, every element is carefully considered. We layer textures, balance proportions, and bring in light to create rooms that feel both curated and genuinely lived-in.
features: Custom furniture selection and layout planning
Lighting design — ambient, task, and accent
Window treatment and soft furnishing sourcing
quote: A living room should feel like a warm embrace — welcoming, beautiful, and entirely yours.

title: Kitchen Design
subtitle: Functional beauty at the heart of your home
excerpt: Beautiful, practical kitchens designed around how you cook — from open-plan layouts to compact city spaces.
description: The kitchen is where creativity and daily life intersect. Whether you're an avid home cook or someone who simply loves a beautiful, organised space, we design kitchens that work as hard as they look good.
description2: We work closely with specialist cabinetmakers, stone suppliers, and appliance consultants to ensure every detail — from drawer mechanisms to worktop edge profiles — is considered. The result is a kitchen that feels effortless.
features: Space planning and ergonomic layout design
Lighting design including task and under-cabinet lighting
quote: The best kitchen is one you never want to leave — designed for how you actually live.

title: Bedroom Design
subtitle: Restful sanctuaries crafted for deep comfort
excerpt: Restful, restorative bedrooms — from master suites to children's rooms — that balance beauty and calm.
description: Sleep is the foundation of wellbeing, and your bedroom should be a true sanctuary. We design bedrooms that calm the senses — using considered materials, layered lighting, and thoughtful storage to create spaces that restore as much as they impress.
description2: From the grand master suite to a peaceful guest room or a child's first 'big kid' bedroom, we apply the same rigorous design process — ensuring every room is both beautiful and deeply personal.
features: Lighting design including bedside and dressing area
Children's room specialisms including safety and adaptability
quote: A bedroom should be the quietest, most beautiful room in your home. Everything else can wait.

title: Bathroom Design
subtitle: Spa-inspired spaces for daily ritual
excerpt: Spa-inspired bathrooms with curated finishes, smart storage, and lighting that sets the mood.
description: A well-designed bathroom elevates the ordinary into something extraordinary. We approach bathrooms as spaces of ritual — designing them to feel luxurious, calm, and deeply considered, no matter the size.
description2: From monolithic stone surfaces to hand-finished tiles and bespoke vanity units, we source materials that age beautifully. Every element — tap, towel rail, mirror — is selected as part of a cohesive whole.
features: Wet room, shower, and bath configuration
quote: The bathroom is the one room where you're guaranteed a moment alone. Make it count.

title: Dining Room Design
subtitle: Spaces that bring people together
excerpt: Dining spaces that bring people together — elegant, welcoming, and designed to last a lifetime.
description: Dining rooms are about more than eating — they're about gathering. We design dining spaces that create the perfect conditions for connection: the right scale, light, materials, and atmosphere to make every meal feel like an occasion.
description2: Whether you need a formal dining room that impresses guests, or a casual open-plan area that flows into your kitchen, we design spaces with equal attention to beauty and practicality.
features: Table and seating selection and layout
Statement lighting — pendants, chandeliers, and sconces
Window treatments for light and privacy control
quote: The best dinner parties happen in rooms designed to be shared.

title: Full Renovation
subtitle: End-to-end transformation, handled completely
excerpt: End-to-end project management — we handle everything from design concept through to final handover.
description: A full renovation is the most transformative thing you can do to a property. It's also the most complex. We exist to make that process smooth, transparent, and genuinely exciting — managing every consultant, contractor, and decision so you don't have to.
description2: From planning applications and structural work to the final placement of art on freshly painted walls, we are your single point of contact. Our project management methodology is built around clear communication, rigorous budgeting, and zero surprises.
features: Structural, MEP, and specialist contractor management
Single point of contact from day one to handover
quote: Renovation shouldn't feel chaotic. With the right team, it can feel like the most exciting chapter of your home's story.
